p.seg: Dúngal son of Udard, to all who shall hear or view these letters, sends greeting.

Know me to have given back and by rod and staff also quitclaimed to William de Brus and his heirs for myself and my heirs, and abjured in full court to him and his heirs for myself and my heirs, the land which I used to hold of him, that is, one ploughgate of land in Warmanbie, and a half ploughgate of land in Annan with one toft for the use of Gilbert son of John; for Gilbert and his heirs to hold of the aforesaid William de Brus and his heirs; and I have given this my charter to the same William de Brus as witness of this restoration, quitclaim and abjuration.

With these witnesses: William ... ; Adam of Seton; Robert of Hoddam; Humphrey de Jardin; Adam son of Adam; Richard of Pennersaughs; William de Heriz ... Murdoch; Udard of Hoddam; Hugh of Corrie; Hugh son of Ingebald; Walter of Walham; Patrick Brus; W ... Walbi; Adam of Dunwoodie; Robert of Crosby; Richard del Bois; Robert of Levington; Roger of Kirkpatrick; Malcolm Lockhart; Robert of Tremore; William de Heineville; Hugh Mauleverer; and many others.
